---
title: "Day 3: Genomic variations and relationships"
author: "Hao CT"
date: "2026-05-14"
format: html
---

Following the previous two days, we have completed the genome assembly and annotation of our *Klebsiella pneumoniae* samples. Now, we will focus on analyzing their variation and relationship at genomic level. We will explore the following topics:

1.  **Read mapping**: Aligning your sample's raw data to a reference genome
2.  **Variant calling**: Comparing the aligned reads to the reference to identify differences (variants)
3.  **Phylogenetic analysis**: Constructing a phylogenetic tree to understand the evolutionary relationships among the samples
